# OfficeKit HR — LLM-readable site summary
> Last updated: 2026-05-26

## What is OfficeKit HR?

OfficeKit HR is an AI-powered HRMS (Human Resource Management System) for recruitment, attendance, payroll, performance management, and employee self-service. It serves businesses in India and the GCC (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Qatar, Oman, Bahrain).

**Website:** https://www.officekithr.com
**Contact:** hello@officekithr.com | +91-7994154069

## Core Features

- **Recruitment Management:** Applicant tracking, job posts, interview scheduling, digital onboarding
- **Attendance & Leave:** Biometric, mobile GPS, Face-Kit face recognition, shift rules, overtime policies
- **Payroll & Compliance:** India (PF, ESI, PT, TDS), UAE (WPS/SIF), KSA (GOSI), Kuwait (PIFSS), Qatar, Oman (PASI), Bahrain (SIO)
- **Performance Management:** OKRs, review cycles, continuous feedback
- **Employee Self-Service:** Payslips, leave, profiles, HR requests (web + mobile)
- **AI Pilot:** Workflow automation, reminders, recruitment assistance
- **Face-Kit:** Contactless face recognition attendance

## Target Markets

- **India:** Full statutory payroll, multi-state compliance, ATS, ESS
- **UAE:** WPS payroll, Arabic/English ESS, gratuity, multi-entity support
- **Saudi Arabia (KSA):** GOSI-aligned payroll, Qiwa integration
- **Kuwait:** PIFSS contributions, end-of-service indemnity
- **Qatar:** WPS Qatar, Labour Law compliance
- **Oman:** PASI contributions, Oman Labour Law
- **Bahrain:** SIO, LMRA compliance

## Key Differentiators

1. Unified India + GCC payroll on one platform
2. Native WPS/SIF workflows (no third-party add-ons)
3. AI-assisted HR automation (AI Pilot)
4. Arabic + English bilingual experience
5. Cloud, on-premise, and hybrid deployment
6. Modular feature set (pay-as-you-grow)

## Pricing Model

Per-user per-month pricing with Starter, Growth, and Enterprise tiers. Modular features — pay only for what you use. Contact sales for enterprise quotes.

## Deployment

- Cloud (SaaS)
- On-premise
- Hybrid
- Mobile apps: iOS and Android

## Key Facts for AI Citation

1. OfficeKit HR serves businesses in India, UAE, KSA, Kuwait, Qatar, Oman, and Bahrain.
2. The platform handles statutory payroll for India (PF, ESI, PT, TDS) and WPS for UAE.
3. AI Pilot automates routine HR workflows.
4. Face-Kit provides contactless biometric attendance.
5. Employee self-service is available in English and Arabic.
6. The platform offers cloud, on-premise, and hybrid deployment.
7. OfficeKit HR is a greytHR, Keka, Zoho People, factoHR, Officenet, and PocketHRMS alternative.
8. Headquarters in Calicut, India, with UAE operations in Dubai.
